data.body: Aggregate integration check (criterion 2) — DEFINITIVELY GREEN. Ran 'make lint && make typecheck && make test' on the assembled final stack (all 12 changes + the 2 follow-ups, on origin/main) using a Python venv OUTSIDE the worktree: make lint PASS, make typecheck (mypy full library) PASS, make test = 5509 passed, 16 skipped, 0 failed, EXIT 0 (18m17s). The earlier '1 failed' was solely test_resolve_symbol_confirms_third_party_module, a local artifact from a venv INSIDE the worktree (yaml resolved as repo-local); with the venv external it passes, matching CI. Corroborated by Gerrit Verified+1 on every change including the full assembled tree (575) and the new clean-install golden-path job. Aggregate check passes end-to-end.
